name: Northern Star Resources Ltd
analysis: NST's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$20.5900, stop A$17.3745, target A$22.7900 (0.68:1) — then trail it.
